final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce landing page hero section UI mockup for a skincare brand called "LUMEA BEAUTY", feminine Japanese beauty market.

Style/medium: clean flat UI mockup, bright and airy feminine aesthetic, floral accents with purple flowers, soft diffused lighting, Figma/Sketch design presentation style
Composition: full-width desktop landing page layout, three-column hero section with header bar at top and benefit cards row at bottom, generous white space
Subject: complete e-commerce landing page hero mockup with the following structure —

HEADER BAR: logo wordmark "LUMEA BEAUTY" on the left; 5 navigation links reading "特徴" / "成分" / "お客様の声" / "使い方" / "FAQ"; CTA button on the right reading "今すぐ試す"

LEFT COLUMN (hero text area):
• Large headline: "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。"
• Subheadline body text: "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。"
• 3 pill-shaped feature badges with small icons: "敏感肌OK" / "高保湿" / "朝晩使える"
• 3 bullet points with pink checkmark icons: "美容成分をしっかり届ける" / "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ" / "続けやすいシンプルケア"
• 2 CTA buttons: primary "初回限定で試してみる >" and secondary "成分をチェック >"
• Trust badge strip: "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし"

CENTER COLUMN: young East Asian woman smiling and touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of moisturizing boost serum, photographed with soft bright lighting against the airy background

RIGHT COLUMN:
• 2 product items displayed: a moisturizing boost serum dropper bottle and its packaging box
• 3 floating white rounded-rectangle stat cards with gold accents: "満足度 96%" / "美容成分 5種配合" / "愛用者 12,000人突破"

BOTTOM SECTION: 3 horizontal white rounded-rectangle benefit cards with icons: "うるおい" / "透明感" / "使いやすさ"

Scene/backdrop: pure white and soft pink background with subtle purple floral decorative elements scattered around the layout
Lighting/mood: soft, even, diffused light throughout; bright and airy; no harsh shadows; gentle feminine warmth
Color palette: soft pink as primary brand color, white as base, purple flower accents, gold as highlight on stat cards; all text in near-black or soft gray
Materials/textures: smooth glass dropper bottle with minimalist label, matte white card surfaces, subtle drop shadows on floating elements
Text (verbatim): "LUMEA BEAUTY", "特徴", "成分", "お客様の声", "使い方", "FAQ", "今すぐ試す", "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。", "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。", "敏感肌OK", "高保湿", "朝晩使える", "美容成分をしっかり届ける", "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ", "続けやすいシンプルケア", "初回限定で試してみる >", "成分をチェック >", "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし", "満足度 96%", "美容成分 5種配合", "愛用者 12,000人突破", "うるおい", "透明感", "使いやすさ"
Constraints: all Japanese text must be legible and correctly rendered; layout must read as a realistic desktop browser mockup at full width; three-column hero structure must be clearly distinguishable; floating cards must appear layered above the background
Avoid: lorem ipsum placeholder text; generic stock photo aesthetic; overly saturated colors; dark or moody tones; cluttered layout; missing navigation elements; blurry or illegible Japanese characters
